AboutPreview.summary: As an Information Systems student at Gunadarma University and developer, I build end-to-end web and mobile applications. I connect product requirements with maintainable technical solutions.

Skills.label: Technical Stack
Skills.title: Engineering Capabilities & Stack
Skills.subtitle: Modern technologies I use daily to build responsive web interfaces, scalable backend services, and native Android applications.
Skills.frontendDesc: Modern responsive interfaces built with Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS v4.
Skills.backendDesc: Transactional data flows, REST/GraphQL APIs, authentication, Supabase PostgreSQL, and Prisma ORM.
Skills.mobileDesc: Offline-first mobile applications using Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, Room DB, Dagger Hilt, and ML Kit.
Skills.deliveryDesc: Clean Architecture, Turborepo monorepos, Git version control, testing, and Vercel deployment.

AboutPage.metaDescription: Profile and engineering principles of Ahmad Hidayatullah - Full Stack & Android Developer.
AboutPage.label: Profile
AboutPage.title: About Me
AboutPage.intro: I am Ahmad Hidayatullah, an Information Systems student at Gunadarma University building modern web and native mobile applications.
AboutPage.backgroundText: My interest in software engineering stems from a desire to create practical, high-performance digital tools. I enjoy decomposing complex problems, designing clean system architectures, and writing maintainable code.
AboutPage.philosophyText: I believe good code solves real problems effectively without unnecessary complexity (over-engineering).
AboutPage.principle1Desc: Structured, simple solutions are always superior to overly complex code.
AboutPage.principle2Desc: Applications must load fast, respond smoothly, and provide intuitive user experiences.
AboutPage.principle3Desc: Consistently upgrading technical capabilities to meet high industry standards.
AboutPage.aiWorkflowText: Every project undergoes a disciplined development cycle from analysis to deployment.
AboutPage.workflowStep1: Product requirement analysis & user flow design.
AboutPage.workflowStep2: Database schema, API contract, and UI architecture planning.
AboutPage.workflowStep3: Type-safe, modular implementation using Next.js / Kotlin.
AboutPage.workflowStep5: Production deployment with automated continuous delivery.
AboutPage.goalsText: Driven to grow within dynamic engineering teams, contribute to scalable systems, and continuously refine my web and mobile capabilities.
